info.name: RoadResQ API v6.0 — Complete
info.description: RoadResQ complete API v6.0.0. Includes: Auth, Jobs, Drivers, Quotes, Garage, Discipline, Safety, Dashboard (role-separated), Completion (finalization, payments, reports, cleanup, audit).

item.name: 🔑 Get Firebase Token (Testing Helper)
item.description: Use this to get a real Firebase ID token for Postman testing.

request.description:
⚠️ Replace the API key in the URL with the actual Firebase Web API Key.
Find it: Firebase Console → Project Settings → General → Web API Key

After running this:
1. Copy idToken from the response
2. Set it as {{idToken}} variable in your Postman environment
3. Use it as: Authorization: Bearer {{idToken}}

item.name: 🔐 Auth

request.description: Register as driver role. Then POST /api/drivers to create driver profile.

🔐 Flutter/mobile gets idToken from Firebase Auth SDK after sign-in.
Send it here to verify + get Firestore profile.

To get idToken in Postman for testing:
1. Use Firebase REST API: POST https://identitytoolkit.googleapis.com/v1/accounts:signInWithPassword?key=AIzaSy...
   Body: { email, password, returnSecureToken: true }
2. Copy idToken from response
3. Paste into {{idToken}} variable

🔐 Protected. Requires: Authorization: Bearer <Firebase ID Token>
Returns full user profile from Firestore.
Get any user profile by Firebase UID.

item.description:
Firebase Auth flow.

Steps:
1. Register with email+password → creates Firebase Auth user + Firestore profile
2. Use Firebase client SDK to sign in → get idToken
3. POST /login with idToken to verify + get profile
4. Use idToken as Bearer token for all protected routes

item.name: 🚗 Jobs — Customer
item.description: Customer-facing job endpoints. Create, track, and manage jobs.

body.raw:
{
  "userId": "{{userId}}",
  "vehicleType": "Sedan",
  "pickup": "Al Dafna, Doha",
  "drop": "Garage Zone, Industrial Area",
  "pickupCoords": { "lat": 25.3548, "lng": 51.1839 },
  "distanceKm": 8.5,
  "isRestrictedArea": false,
  "additionalNotes": "Car won't start, keys inside"
}

request.description: Creates job. Auto-assigns best driver. Returns dispatchStatus if no driver available.

body.raw:
{
  "userId": "{{userId}}",
  "vehicleType": "JCB 3CX Backhoe",
  "pickup": "Lusail Construction Site",
  "drop": "Equipment Storage, Ras Laffan",
  "pickupCoords": { "lat": 25.4337, "lng": 51.5063 },
  "distanceKm": 65,
  "clearanceHeightMm": 2900,
  "isRestrictedArea": false
}

request.description: Creates heavy equipment job. System derives flatbed_heavy + boom_truck or flatbed requirement.

body.raw:
{
  "userId": "{{userId}}",
  "vehicleType": "Sedan",
  "pickup": "West Bay Mall Basement B2",
  "drop": "Service Center, Al Sadd",
  "pickupCoords": { "lat": 25.3198, "lng": 51.5245 },

request.description: Job from basement parking. Matches only drivers with height clearance and gate pass.
Customer sees all their jobs with human-readable status messages and driver info. Filter by status (optional).
Real-time job status with driver ETA. Powers the tracking screen.
Rate driver 1–5 after job is completed.

body.raw:
{
  "userId": "{{userId}}",
  "vehicleType": "Sedan",
  "pickup": "The Pearl Qatar, Doha",
  "drop": "Al Sadd Service Center",
  "pickupCoords": {
    "lat": 25.3713,
    "lng": 51.5509
  },
  "distanceKm": 6.2,
  "isScheduled": true,
  "scheduledPickupDate": "2026-05-15",
  "scheduledPickupTime": "09:00",
  "customerNotes": "Please arrive on time, I have a meeting at 10am"
}

request.description:
📅 Scheduled job — driver assigned closer to pickup date.
Response includes dispatchStatus.isScheduled=true with confirmation message.

scheduledPickupDate: YYYY-MM-DD format
scheduledPickupTime: HH:MM (24h, Qatar time)

Cancel a job. Releases assigned driver.
cancellationReason: customer_request | no_driver_available | driver_no_show | changed_mind
cancelledBy: customer | driver | system
Returns open jobs that match the driver's truck type. Driver app polls or listens to this.
Valid statuses: pending → assigned → accepted → in_progress → on_site → at_garage → completed | cancelled

item.name: 🔍 Matching & Pricing
item.description: Service catalog, price calculator, and matching engine.

request.description: Returns all vehicle types, truck type hierarchy, equipment types, and pricing rules.
Price breakdown in QAR halala. Divide by 100 for display. e.g. 4500 = QR 45.00
Returns ranked list of matching drivers with _matchedOn debug info showing why each driver qualifies.

item.name: 📋 Quotes
item.description:
Quote flow — GARAGE DRIVEN. Admin is read-only.

Flow: Customer submits → Garage responds with price → Customer accepts → Job created.

body.raw:
{
  "userId": "{{userId}}",
  "serviceType": "quote_industrial",
  "vehicleType": "20ft Container",
  "itemDescription": "20ft shipping container, loaded with office furniture",
  "pickup": "Hamad Port, Doha",
  "drop": "Al Khor Industrial Zone",
  "pickupCoords": {
    "lat": 25.1135,
    "lng": 51.5522
  },
  "estimatedWeight": 12000,
  "urgency": "medium",
  "preferredDate": "2026-05-10",
  "preferredTime": "08:00",
  "customerNotes": "Available from 8am onwards"
}

request.description:
Submit industrial quote. preferredDate/Time optional for scheduling.
Broadcasts to nearby garages within 15km.
Customer's quotes with status messages. Shows what garage responded and at what price.

item.name: Garage Responds with Price ← GARAGE ONLY

request.description: GARAGE ONLY — Admin cannot respond to quotes. quotedPrice in halala: 85000 = QR 850.00
Creates a job from the accepted quote and auto-assigns driver. Returns dispatchStatus.
Admin report endpoint — read only. Filter by userId, garageId, status.

item.name: 🔧 Garage (On-Site Repair)
item.description: On-site repair flow. Customer requests → Garages bid estimates → Customer picks one.

request.description:
Request on-site repair. Broadcasts to garages within 10km.
isScheduled: true = future booking (autoCancelAt disabled until scheduled time)
preferredDate: YYYY-MM-DD, preferredTime: HH:MM
price in halala: 8000 = QR 80.00. eta in minutes.
Returns sorted estimates (cheapest first). Flags isBestPrice and isFastestArrival.
First-accept-wins. Assigns garage and reveals customer contact to garage.
Status flow: accepted → on_the_way → in_progress → completed | cancelled
Call after 15 minutes if no garage accepted. Returns cancelTriggered and minutesUntilAutoCancel.

📅 Scheduled garage repair request.
Garages notified but auto-cancel timer not started until scheduled date.

item.name: 👤 Drivers
item.description: Driver management, status, and online/offline control.

request.description: Run after POST /api/auth/register with role=driver. truckType: light_tow | standard_tow | heavy_tow | flatbed_small | flatbed_heavy | service_van
All valid truck types with labels. Use in registration dropdowns.
Returns isOnline, isAvailable, isApproved, compliance (expired docs), canTakeJobs, activeJobId.
Sets isOnline=true, isAvailable=true. Blocked if not approved, suspended, or compliance blocked.
Sets isOnline=false, isAvailable=false. Blocked if driver has an active job.
Legacy endpoint. Use /online and /offline instead.

item.name: 📊 Admin Reports
item.description: Admin-only read access. No write operations — use garage/driver endpoints for changes.

request.description: All quotes across all users and garages.
All on-site repair requests.
Pending driver approvals.

item.name: 🛡️ Discipline & Safety
item.description: Driver discipline, compliance, safety checklists, and priority queue.

request.description: Charges QR 50 (5000 halala) when customer does not respond within 10 minutes of driver arrival.
Adds 1 warning to driver. At 3 warnings account is auto-suspended.
Resets warning count and lifts suspension.
Scans all drivers: 30-day notice, 7-day critical, expired = blocked. Run daily via scheduler.
Returns overallStatus: valid | expiring_soon | expiring_critical | expired. Shows days remaining per document.
All pending jobs scored by urgency + wait time. Highest score dispatched first.
Custom/Others jobs system could not auto-match. Admin manually assigns driver.
Admin assigns driver to custom job. Marks admin_review_queue resolved.
All 7 items must be true before job can start. Returns 400 with failedChecks list if any missing.
3 safety items customer must confirm. Required before job confirmation.
Returns both driver pre-trip and customer confirmation records. bothCompleted flag for UI.

item.name: 💰 Quote Bidding (Industrial)
item.description: Multi-driver bidding for industrial/heavy quotes. Customer compares bids and accepts the best.

body.raw: {"garageId":"{{garageId}}","bidderName":"Al Rayyan Heavy Transport","price":85000,"etaMinutes":45,"equipment":["boom_truck","flatbed"],"notes":"Includes crane operator. Price valid 48hrs.","rating":4.8,"vehicleModel":"Volvo FH16 Flatbed"}

request.description: price in halala: 85000 = QR 850.00. Multiple bidders allowed. Quote status becomes collecting_bids.
Sorted by price ASC. isBestPrice and isFastestArrival flags highlight top bids. Returns lowestPriceDisplay.
Accepts winning bid, rejects all others automatically, creates linked job with bid price and ETA.
Returns all active jobs with color (red/yellow/green), open incidents, unread alerts.
Today's stats: total jobs, high-risk count, incidents, avg response time, drivers online.
All unread admin alerts (panic, inactivity, fraud).
types: unsafe_behavior | fraud | delay | damage | no_show | overcharging | panic_triggered
action: warn | suspend | ban | resolve | escalate
Triggers critical alert, flags job red, creates incident — one call.
Checks all active jobs — flags any with no update for 15+ minutes.
All jobs flagged as suspicious or high-risk.
Top users grouped by fraud score and flagged job count.
Score breakdown: cancel rate, price deviation, location mismatch, etc.
Calculates and stores fraud score on the job document.
level: warning | temporary_block (7 days) | permanent_ban

types: overcharging | service_not_completed | delay | wrong_service | damage | no_show | fraud
System auto-resolves if confidence >= 80%.
decisions: refund_user | partial_refund | charge_user | pay_driver | escalate | no_action

locationType: highway | industrial_zone | desert | basement | residential
Returns risk score, level (low/medium/high/critical), and dynamic warning messages.
Returns 4-digit PIN to customer. Driver must enter this at arrival. PIN is hashed in DB.
If correct, job moves to in_progress automatically.
Must be called before driver is dispatched on high-risk jobs.
Rating 1-2 or feltSafe=false auto-creates an incident.
Returns: riskLevel, safetyConfirmed, pinVerified, isPanicTriggered, safetyFlags.

item.name: Dashboard (Role-Separated)
item.description: Role-separated dashboards. Each role sees ONLY their data.

request.description: Returns: active jobs, incidents, fraud flags, disputes, alerts, pending payments.
Returns: driver profile, active jobs, completed jobs, earnings, warnings.
Returns: user profile, active jobs, past jobs, disputes, safety feedback, spending.
Returns: active requests, completed repairs, pending quotes, earnings.

item.name: Completion + Payments + Reports
item.description: Week 5: Job finalization, payment escrow/release, report generation, file cleanup, archiving, audit logging.

request.description: THE MAIN FLOW. Validates job -> checks disputes -> generates report -> releases payment -> soft-deletes files -> marks job completed.
Holds payment in escrow (amount in halala: 15000 = QR 150.00). Called when driver accepts job.
Returns payment record: amount, status (pending/held/released/refunded/disputed), timestamps.
List payments. Filter by status, driverId, customerId.
Returns comprehensive job report: timeline, payment, driver, safety, GPS, photos, disputes.
List reports. Filter by userId or driverId.
Archives completed jobs older than 30 days. Status: completed -> archived.
Processes soft-deleted files past 24h grace period. Deletes from Firebase Storage with 3x retry.
Returns pending deletions count, failed deletions count. Alerts admin if threshold exceeded.
Returns audit log entries. Filter by eventType, entityId, entityType, actorId.
Returns all audit events for a specific entity (job, driver, user). Ordered chronologically.

item.name: Safety Checklists (Service-Specific)
item.description: Week 4+: Service-specific safety checklists for tow mount, heavy equipment, garage, industrial.

request.description: Returns all available service safety checklists with their items.
Returns tow-specific safety checklist (vehicle mount check).

body.raw:
{
  "jobId": "job_001",
  "driverId": "driver_001",
  "serviceType": "tow",
  "checks": {
    "vehicleLoadedSecurely": true,
    "strapsChainsTightened": true,
    "handbrakeEngaged": true,
    "towHookWinchConnected": true,
    "towedVehicleInNeutral": true,
    "tailLightsReflectors": true,
    "noLooseItems": true,
    "wheelLiftSecured": true
  }
}

request.description: Driver submits tow mount safety check. ALL items must be true before job can proceed.
